## Description
Please describe the changes in this pull request and the issues they address.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change resolving an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature requiring database/route migrations)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] Code builds cleanly locally (`npm run build`).
- [ ] Linter validation passes (`npm run lint`).
- [ ] All new tests pass successfully.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated accordingly.
